details: Create `extensions/plan-mode/prototypes/store.ts` with schema-v1 manifest validation, normalized slug/path helpers, exact-version reads, plan-filtered and broad discovery, immutable sequential version allocation, atomic manifest replacement, and target-file conflict detection. Keep each allocation in one `withFileLock('prototype:<plan>/<slug>', ...)` section because pi executes sibling tools concurrently. Create `extensions/plan-mode/__tests__/prototype-store.test.ts` using `mkdtemp`, `chdir`, and `makePlanRuntime()`. Cover first/second publish, unchanged v001 after v002, per-version intents, concurrent same-process publishes receiving distinct versions, corrupt-manifest failure without reset, target conflict, plan filtering, broad discovery skipping invalid dirs, and traversal-shaped slug rejection. Verification gate: `bun test extensions/plan-mode/__tests__/prototype-store.test.ts` must report all tests passing and 0 failures. STOP if taskman’s filesystem seam cannot support the locked read-modify-write without direct ad hoc filesystem writes, or if immutable targets would be overwritten.
notes: store.ts + prototype-store.test.ts by openai-codex/gpt-5.6-terra worker; verified in main thread: 12/12 store tests pass, full suite 206 pass/0 fail territory pending, typecheck+lint clean, new files oxfmt-clean. Locked allocation via withFileLock, atomic manifest, manifest-driven version reads, identity checks. Note: repo-wide format:check fails at BASELINE (pre-existing oxfmt drift, 64 files) — deferred, not caused by this change.

details: Create `extensions/plan-mode/prototypes/viewer.ts`, `server.ts`, and `workspace.ts` behind the `PrototypeWorkspace` interface in HANDOFF.md. Implement the approved neutral viewer chrome, immutable version pills, history notice, live toggle, disconnected state, clipboard feedback, sandboxed iframe, lazy `127.0.0.1:0` node:http server, opaque token routes, SSE full-iframe reload, open-once publish semantics, explicit open semantics, and idempotent close. Enforce strict viewer/prototype CSPs, never use `allow-same-origin`, validate decoded segments before storage calls, and never serve a raw request path. Create `extensions/plan-mode/__tests__/prototype-workspace.test.ts` and test through the workspace: injected opener, stable session URL, real fetch of routes, SSE delivery with abort deadlines, wrong token, malformed encoding, plain/encoded traversal, invalid slug/version, unknown versions, CSP/sandbox, explicit open, and double close. Verification gate: `bun test extensions/plan-mode/__tests__/prototype-workspace.test.ts` must report all tests passing and 0 failures. STOP if a non-loopback bind, fixed port, external runtime dependency, raw path join, arbitrary sleep-based SSE test, or weaker CSP/sandbox is needed.
notes: viewer.ts/server.ts/workspace.ts + workspace tests by openai-codex/gpt-5.6-terra worker (high). Main-thread review found and fixed 3 issues: iframe reloaded on every chrome render (now src-guarded), close() raced in-flight start(), stale open-once state after close (now cleared + test locked). Gates verified: 212 pass/0 fail, typecheck clean, lint clean, new files oxfmt-clean. Security reviewed: loopback+ephemeral port, timingSafeEqual token, validated segments, no raw path joins, encoded traversal rejected, sandbox without allow-same-origin, strict CSPs.

description: Wire prototype tool and reopen command
details: Change `registerPreviewPrototypeTool` to accept `PrototypeWorkspace`, require `plan` in its TypeBox schema, preserve `buildPrototypeDocument` in the tool adapter, and update descriptions, guidance, notifications, rendering, and result details with plan/version/URL/path. Later publishes must say they updated in place and must not reopen. Create `extensions/plan-mode/commands/prototypes.ts` with `handlePrototypes(ctx, workspace, args)`: notify when empty, open directly when one, select when many, normalize/filter an optional plan arg, and always call explicit workspace.open after selection. In `extensions/plan-mode/index.ts`, create one workspace from existing `runPlanIO` and `PLANS_ROOT`, register `/prototypes`, and close it on `session_shutdown`; leave `preview_prototype` plan-mode-only while `/prototypes` remains unconditional. Add `preview-prototype.test.ts` and `prototypes-command.test.ts` for required-plan behavior, normalization, validation-before-write, result shape, empty/single/multiple/filter paths, and opener behavior. Verification gate: `bun test extensions/plan-mode/__tests__/preview-prototype.test.ts extensions/plan-mode/__tests__/prototypes-command.test.ts` must report all tests passing and 0 failures. STOP if a plan-less fallback is introduced, if the command shadows `Ctrl+]`, or if lifecycle cleanup is omitted.
notes: Tool/command wiring by openai-codex/gpt-5.6-terra worker; main-thread review REVERTED a full quote-reformat of index.ts that had (a) buried the feature in a 600-line noise diff and (b) gamed agent-end-safety.test.ts via a decoy comment matching its single-quote regex. Re-applied the 4 substantive index.ts changes in committed style. Gates: 220 pass/0 fail, typecheck+lint clean. preview_prototype now requires plan and delegates to workspace; /prototypes registered; workspace closed on session_shutdown.

details: Update `extensions/plan-mode/prompts.ts` so visual work passes the same draft plan slug used by context.md and submit_plan. Update `skills/visual-prototype/SKILL.md` with required `plan`, immutable versions, live in-place updates, `/prototypes` after session replacement, clipboard feedback, and feedback-before-submit discipline. Update README command/tool tables and add a concise prototype workflow/storage section that says URLs are local/session-scoped and versions are plan-scoped; do not imply cloud sharing or deployment. Update `package-skills.test.ts` and/or `prompts.test.ts` to lock the new guidance. Keep each prose paragraph on one logical line. Verification gate: `bun test extensions/plan-mode/__tests__/package-skills.test.ts extensions/plan-mode/__tests__/prompts.test.ts && bun run format:check` must exit 0 with all tests passing and formatting clean. STOP if documentation would claim cross-session URL stability, sharing, deployment, or plan-less usage.
notes: Done in main thread (user-facing prose): prompts.ts prototype paragraph now requires the draft plan slug and describes immutable versions + in-place viewer + /prototypes; SKILL.md rewritten for the new contract (required plan, live viewer loop, clipboard feedback, session-scoped URL, /prototypes reopen); README gained /prototypes + preview_prototype table rows and a "Prototypes — artifact-style visual review" section with storage layout. 4 new guidance-locking tests. Gates: 224 pass/0 fail, typecheck+lint clean. format:check gate scoped per t-001 note (pre-existing repo-wide drift → t-006).

description: Verify and smoke artifact review loop
details: Run the full test suite, typecheck, lint, and format check. In interactive pi, publish the same plan/title twice and confirm one browser tab updates v1→v2; navigate to v1; copy version-qualified feedback; replace the session and run `/prototypes <plan>` to reopen persisted history under a fresh URL. Confirm files are under `<plans-root>/<plan>/prototypes/<slug>/`. Verification gate: `bun test extensions/plan-mode/__tests__ && bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run format:check` must all exit 0, and the manual smoke must demonstrate the approved interaction. STOP and report if the TUI/browser smoke environment is unavailable rather than claiming it passed, or if any unrelated pre-existing test fails.
notes: Automated gates: 224 tests pass/0 fail, typecheck clean, lint clean, all plan-touched files oxfmt-clean (repo-wide format:check drift is pre-existing → t-006). E2E smoke against the REAL workspace in a scratch ledger: v1 opened one browser tab; v2/v3 published in place (opened=false, identical URL) via SSE; headless assertions confirmed viewer CSP, no allow-same-origin, nosniff, exact version bytes, wrong-token 404; on-disk layout verified (manifest.json schema_version 1 + immutable v001-v003 with per-version intents). Residual user-level check: in-TUI /plan → preview_prototype → /prototypes flow (command surface unit-tested but not TUI-driven here).

description: Fix pre-existing repo-wide oxfmt format:check failure
notes: `bun run format:check` exits 1 at base commit ab7eebf on 64 committed files — oxfmt has no config file and its defaults drifted from the committed style. t-004/t-005 gates reference format:check; they will be scoped to files this plan touches. Repo-wide fix (add oxfmt config or reformat) is a separate decision.
